/**
 * Utilities for exporting an explanation.
 * Markdown is generated inline (no deps). PDF uses jsPDF on the client side.
 */import jsPDF from'jspdf';export function explanationToMarkdown(code,language,exp){const lines=[];lines.push("# CodeExplain \u2014 ".concat(exp.overview));lines.push('');lines.push("> Language: **".concat(exp.detected_language||language,"** \xB7 Model: **").concat(exp.model_used,"** (").concat(exp.provider_used,")"));lines.push('');lines.push('## Submitted code');lines.push('```'+(exp.detected_language||language));lines.push(code);lines.push('```');lines.push('');lines.push('## Plain-English explanation');lines.push(exp.plain_english_explanation);lines.push('');lines.push('## Time complexity');lines.push("**".concat(exp.time_complexity.big_o,"** \u2014 ").concat(exp.time_complexity.reasoning));lines.push('');lines.push('## Space complexity');lines.push("**".concat(exp.space_complexity.big_o,"** \u2014 ").concat(exp.space_complexity.reasoning));lines.push('');lines.push('## Line-by-line walkthrough');exp.line_by_line.forEach(l=>{lines.push("### Line ".concat(l.line_range));lines.push('```');lines.push(l.code_snippet);lines.push('```');lines.push(l.explanation);lines.push('');});lines.push('## Suggested improvements');exp.improvements.forEach(imp=>{lines.push("### ".concat(imp.title," _(").concat(imp.category,")_"));lines.push(imp.detail);lines.push('');});lines.push('---');lines.push('_Generated by CodeExplain._');return lines.join('\n');}export function downloadText(filename,content){let mime=arguments.length>2&&arguments[2]!==undefined?arguments[2]:'text/plain';const blob=new Blob([content],{type:mime});const url=URL.createObjectURL(blob);const a=document.createElement('a');a.href=url;a.download=filename;document.body.appendChild(a);a.click();a.remove();URL.revokeObjectURL(url);}/**
 * Render the explanation as a paginated, wrapped-text PDF using jsPDF text
 * primitives. We deliberately avoid html2canvas here because the dark UI
 * doesn't rasterise cleanly — plain text prints far more legibly.
 */export function explanationToPdf(code,language,exp){const doc=new jsPDF({unit:'pt',format:'a4'});const pageWidth=doc.internal.pageSize.getWidth();const pageHeight=doc.internal.pageSize.getHeight();const margin=48;const maxWidth=pageWidth-margin*2;let y=margin;const write=function(text){var _opts$size,_opts$style;let opts=arguments.length>1&&arguments[1]!==undefined?arguments[1]:{};const size=(_opts$size=opts.size)!==null&&_opts$size!==void 0?_opts$size:11;doc.setFont(opts.mono?'courier':'helvetica',(_opts$style=opts.style)!==null&&_opts$style!==void 0?_opts$style:'normal');doc.setFontSize(size);const wrapped=doc.splitTextToSize(text,maxWidth);for(const line of wrapped){if(y>pageHeight-margin){doc.addPage();y=margin;}doc.text(line,margin,y);y+=size*1.35;}y+=4;};write('CodeExplain',{size:20,style:'bold'});write(exp.overview,{size:12});write("Language: ".concat(exp.detected_language||language,"   \xB7   Model: ").concat(exp.model_used," (").concat(exp.provider_used,")"),{size:10});write('Submitted code',{size:13,style:'bold'});write(code,{size:9.5,mono:true});write('Plain-English explanation',{size:13,style:'bold'});write(exp.plain_english_explanation);write("Time complexity \u2014 ".concat(exp.time_complexity.big_o),{size:13,style:'bold'});write(exp.time_complexity.reasoning);write("Space complexity \u2014 ".concat(exp.space_complexity.big_o),{size:13,style:'bold'});write(exp.space_complexity.reasoning);write('Line-by-line walkthrough',{size:13,style:'bold'});exp.line_by_line.forEach(l=>{write("Line ".concat(l.line_range),{size:11,style:'bold'});write(l.code_snippet,{size:9.5,mono:true});write(l.explanation);});write('Suggested improvements',{size:13,style:'bold'});exp.improvements.forEach(imp=>{write("".concat(imp.title,"  (").concat(imp.category,")"),{size:11,style:'bold'});write(imp.detail);});doc.save('codeexplain.pdf');}
